category_sources: source_facts.description says Kompose is a tool to move from docker-compose to Kubernetes.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is kompose; the official site and repository use Kompose.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Kompose site; official pages include installation, user guide, and architecture documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/kubernetes/kompose, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Docker Compose to Kubernetes conversion; source_facts.repo is under the official Kubernetes GitHub organization.
